title: lithospermum caroliniense var. croceum
intro: Lithospermum caroliniense var. croceum, also known as Purple Gromwell, is a flowering plant in the borage family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lithospermum caroliniense var. croceum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal properties to be utilized, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
